# Icon

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** text  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `material-symbols-outlined`, `Icon`

Material Symbols icon glyph.

_Source: `src/primitives/ui.js`_

## Import

```js
import { Icon } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### Icon library

```js
const grid = new Grid().addClass("Gallery-iconGrid");
  grid.setStyle("display", ["grid"]);
  grid.setStyle("gridTemplateColumns", ["repeat(auto-fill, minmax(5.5rem, 1fr))"]);
  grid.setStyle("gap", ["0.75rem"]);

  Object.entries(ICONS).forEach(([key, name]) => {
    grid.add(
      new StackPanel({ isVertical: true })
        .addClass("Gallery-iconCell")
        .setStyle("alignItems", ["center"])
        .setStyle("gap", ["0.25rem"])
        .setStyle("padding", ["0.5rem"])
        .add(new Icon(name))
        .add(new Caption(key)),
    );
  });

  return grid;
```
